Our Story

A history of inspiring experiences

  • History
  • Purpose
  • Leadership
  • Impact & sustainability
  • Inclusion & diversity

History

Shaping travel since 1996

Expedia began as a scrappy startup inside Microsoft, with a bold idea: technology could transform travel, and exploration should be part of everyone’s life — not a luxury for the few. With a name combining “exploration” and “speed,” we embarked on a spirited journey that continues today, guided by that same enduring spirit.

Pioneering a new way to travel

It started with a simple goal: to give travelers more control over their own trips. Expedia.com launched in 1996 as a division of Microsoft, becoming one of the first platforms people could use to research and book travel online.  

 

In 1999 we went public, continuing our expansion. In 2000 Travelscape became part of the company, and in 2002 we launched a new corporate travel division. Onward and upward!

Becoming a travel powerhouse

The early 2000s were about bringing more options to the table. Under IAC, we welcomed major names like Hotels.com, Hotwire, and Tripadvisor into our family of brands. 

 

In 2005, we took a big step forward, spinning off as Expedia, Inc.: an independent, publicly traded company dedicated entirely to travel.

Going global

We expanded our reach into Asia and Europe and introduced new services, like cruise and car rentals, to make sure travelers could book their entire trip in one place. We also started building tools to help our partners reach the right travelers, creating better connections across the entire industry.

Stretching the boundaries

As the way people traveled began to change, we evolved with it. We saw that travelers wanted more than just hotels — they wanted whole homes. We brought HomeAway and Vrbo into the fold to offer vacation rentals, while also acquiring trusted brands like Orbitz, travelocity, and wotif. We also invested in trivago, giving people a powerful new way to compare prices and find the perfect stay.

Becoming Expedia Group

In 2018, we became Expedia Group, uniting all our brands and 20+ years of experience under a single goal: to be the bridge between the world’s travelers and the world’s travel providers. Instead of just selling trips, we started powering the entire industry, giving partners the tools to succeed and travelers more options to explore.

Building for the future

When the pandemic put the world on pause, we rallied our team’s expertise to improve our services and help partners and destinations endure. We modernized our technology, moving from separate systems to a single platform. It was a challenging time for the industry, but it allowed us to build a stronger foundation to support our partners and travelers when the world opened up again.

Where there’s life, there’s travel.

Travel is about more than going from A to B. It's about memories, shared connections, and expanding your outlook. For over three decades, we've helped travelers explore the world on their own terms, and we aren't stopping now.

Purpose

Driven to help the world explore

What began as a belief that technology could open travel to more people, continues to guide us today. Our purpose is simple: helping more travelers experience our world.

See our purpose

Opening more of the world to more travelers

70+

countries and destinations open for exploration¹

3.5M+

stay options — from luxury hotels to tree houses²

200K+

unique activities and experiences to enjoy³

Leadership

Meet our leadership team

Our leadership team shares a passion for opening the world for all and a commitment to building travel’s most trusted marketplace.

Executive Leaders

Guide our divisions and functions in delivering secure, seamless platforms that help travelers explore the world with confidence.

Meet the team
Travel Leadership Team

Shapes our global strategy and leads the teams building the travel experiences and technology that power our brands.

Meet the team
Board of Directors

Provides long‑term vision and independent oversight to ensure Expedia Group remains a trusted global travel leader.

Meet the team

Impact & Sustainability

Travel that makes a positive impact

This means safeguarding the environment and supporting local communities to keep global exploration rewarding for everyone.

How we make a difference

From volunteering to destination stewardship, addressing climate change, and supporting responsible business practices, our teams go the extra mile to make a positive impact on our planet.

 

 

View our initiatives

Committed to a sustainable future

90%

absolute reduction of emissions goal by 2040⁴

$16M

in philanthropic funding⁵

100+

destinations increased climate capacity⁶

Inclusion & Diversity

A world where everyone is welcome

When people bring what makes them unique, innovation thrives. That’s how we create travel experiences that resonate with travelers, partners, and communities around the world.

 

Discover what matters to us

Going beyond

Where we’re going next

As we enter our third decade, we remain fully dedicated to powering global exploration. Check out our newsroom for the latest on our growing partnerships, new features, and business milestones.

See latest news
